name: Andes Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and butter or margarine.
2. Add the eggs and water; beat well until combined.
3. Mix in the flour, baking soda, and salt separately first, then add to the egg mixture gradually.
4. Chill the dough overnight. Ensure it is thoroughly chilled before proceeding.
5. Wrap each Andes mint completely in cookie dough.
6. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on lightly greased cookie sheets.
7. Put a pecan half on top of each cookie.
8. Bake for 7-9 minutes at 375°F until golden brown.
